extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Reads your MyTANITA body-composition CSV export through your own logged-in session — no password, no API key — and hands it to the Kaiord editor.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

checking.description: Status text while the popup probes the session.

checkingAria.description: Accessible label for the checking status pill.

connectedToTanita.description: Status text when the MyTANITA session can reach the export.

connectedHint.message: Reading your body-composition export through your session.
connectedHint.description: Hint shown below the status when connected.

noSession.description: Status text when the MyTANITA session cannot reach the export.

noSessionHint.message: Open MyTANITA and sign in, then reopen this popup.
noSessionHint.description: Hint telling the user how to establish a session.

openTanita.description: Button that opens mytanita.eu in a new tab.

openTanitaAria.description: Accessible label for the Open MyTANITA button.
